narrative:
Hubbard Twp D (precinct in Trumbull County) has 979 registered voters, with 56.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.0%, a modest Democratic lean of 4.2 percentage points.
